nodes.label: Disk Sidebar Display and Usage Refresh Fixes Handoffs
nodes.author: software-engineer
nodes.norm_label: disk sidebar display and usage refresh fixes handoffs

nodes.label: Popup System and Settings UI Overhaul Design Specification
nodes.author: ui-ux-designer
nodes.norm_label: popup system and settings ui overhaul design specification

nodes.label: Architecture Context: System Shape and Conflict Resolution
nodes.author: main-agent
nodes.norm_label: architecture context: system shape and conflict resolution

nodes.label: Soft and Elevated Aesthetic Concept
nodes.author: ui-ux-designer
nodes.rationale: A visual style moving away from sharp borders toward macOS/iOS-like friendly design, using generous padding (32px), large border radii (24px outer, 16px inner), soft shadows, and card-based settings layouts to enhance user comfort and aesthetic appeal.

nodes.label: Glassmorphism Tokenization Concept
nodes.author: software-engineer
nodes.rationale: Consolidating CSS variables (e.g., --glass-bg, --glass-border) under :root ensures theme-wide compliance, reduces styling duplicates, and makes aesthetic adjustment easy.

nodes.label: Display-Only Quote Cleanup Rationale
nodes.author: software-engineer
nodes.rationale: Stripping outer quote pairs must be purely presentation-level. Mutating raw disk paths or names risks breaking directory navigation, unmounting, and backend filesystem API calls.

nodes.label: Event-Driven Disk Refresh Rationale
nodes.author: software-engineer
nodes.rationale: Coalescing disk usage refreshes after file operation completions via debouncing avoids constant background polling, preserving CPU cycles and UI responsiveness.

nodes.label: Copy/Move Conflict Policies Concept
nodes.author: main-agent
nodes.rationale: Replacing automatic renaming with explicit conflict options (Replace, Merge, Duplicate, Skip) enables safe directory management, staging-based replacement, and avoids accidental data loss.

nodes.label: AI Background Removal via Gemini Concept
nodes.author: ui-ux-designer
nodes.rationale: Using Gemini 3.1 Flash Image to automatically remove backgrounds from source images and returning base64 transparent PNGs is lightweight, does not require local neural models, and runs asynchronously as a background task.
nodes.norm_label: ai background removal via gemini concept

nodes.label: Data Models and State Specification File
nodes.norm_label: data models and state specification file

nodes.label: UI-Based Conflict Discovery Design Decision
nodes.rationale: Prefer frontend conflict discovery + modal because user decisions are UI concerns and existing modal patterns are frontend-only.

nodes.label: Explicit Conflict Policy Backend Design Decision
nodes.rationale: Add backend support for explicit conflict policy rather than overloading get_final_filename; current backend always duplicates by generating name (n).
nodes.norm_label: explicit conflict policy backend design decision

nodes.label: Conflict API Option B Safety Decision
nodes.rationale: Option B (check_copy_conflicts and arr_copy_paste_with_conflicts as new commands) is safer because it avoids breaking existing behavior and gives platform-correct path resolution in Rust.
nodes.norm_label: conflict api option b safety decision
